description: Test vectors for participant_step2(hostseckey, pstate1, cmsg1, auxRand).
Executes the second round of DKG from a participant's perspective.
Processes the coordinator's aggregated message (cmsg1) and produces a partial signature (pmsg2).
Harness setup (re-derive state from prior round):
1. Call participant_step1(hostseckey, params, random) to obtain (pstate1, pmsg1_out).
2. Assert pmsg1_out == pmsg1 (verifies your step1 implementation before testing step2).
A test case may provide 'hostseckey', 'random', and/or 'auxRand' fields to override
the group-level values. If 'hostseckey' or 'random' differ from the group defaults,  re-derive pstate1 by calling participant_step1(hostseckey, params, random) again.
If the test case provides a 'pmsg1' field, assert the re-derived pmsg1 matches it.
Then call participant_step2(hostseckey, pstate1, cmsg1, auxRand).
Verify the returned pmsg2 equals expectedPmsg2.
Verify it raises an exception matching expectedError.
Error objects contain 'type' (exception class name) and optionally:
- 'participant': index of the blamed party (for FaultyParticipantOrCoordinatorError)
- 'message': human-readable description (informational, not required to match exactly)

errorTestCases.comment: length of aux randomness is not 32 bytes

expectedError.message: Host secret key does not match the one used in participant_step1

errorTestCases.comment: hostseckey does not match the one used in participant_step1
invalid cmsg1: pubnonces list has an invalid prefix at index 0 (own pubnonce)
invalid cmsg1: pubnonces list has an invalid prefix at index 1
invalid cmsg1: pubnonces list has an off-curve x-coordinate at index 0 (own pubnonce)
invalid cmsg1: pubnonces list has an off-curve x-coordinate at index 1
invalid cmsg1: pubnonces list has an arbitrary value at index 0 (own pubnonce)

expectedError.message: Received invalid secshare, consider investigation procedure to determine faulty party

errorTestCases.comment: invalid cmsg1: pubnonces list has an arbitrary value at index 1
invalid cmsg1: pubnonces list has the infinity point at index 0 (own pubnonce)
invalid cmsg1: pubnonces list has the infinity point at index 1

expectedError.message: Received invalid secshare, consider investigation procedure to determine faulty party

invalid cmsg1: missing encrypted secret shares
